prompt: Mock up a 'School Onboarding' app page as a single self-contained HTML file: global top bar (org 360iSuite), app tab bar with Onboarding active, left views pane with grouped views and counts, view toolbar (17 of 17, Dig/Sheet/Reports, Add School), sheet view of ~8 schools with status chips.
assertions: Primary action button uses Podio teal #15808D
Active view toggle is the Podio orange pill #F7A11C
Uses the Podio pastel chip palette (3+ token pairs from tokens.md)
No blue primary color (blue-600 / #2563EB family absent)
